subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath guided His servants unto His straight path and His mighty Call, and hath sent down upon them from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی هدی العباد الی صراطه المستقیم و نباه العظیم و انزل علیهم من
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement
